build.description: Type-check the CLI entrypoint, source files, and tests
build.command: deno check --config deno.json main.ts src/*.ts tests/smoke/*.ts

typecheck.description: Type-check the CLI entrypoint, source files, and tests
typecheck.command: deno check --config deno.json main.ts src/*.ts tests/smoke/*.ts

test:e2e.description: Run the superctl CLI smoke tests

check.description: Run format, lint, type-check, and tests for superctl
check.command: deno fmt --check . && deno task lint && deno task typecheck && deno task test:unit

ci:gate.description: Run repo gate checks without shelling through the CLI entrypoint

ci:test.description: Run repo test checks without shelling through the CLI entrypoint

ci:audit.description: Run repo audit checks without shelling through the CLI entrypoint

compile.description: Compile the superctl binary to dist/superctl

release:bump.description: Bump deno.json version for a stable or release-candidate superctl release
